### `id`

integer

### `date_created`

string (date-time)

The moment when the item was created.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified. A value in year 1750 indicates the value is unknown

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_upload`

string (date-time)

upload_date in RECAP. The date the file was uploaded to RECAP. This information is provided by RECAP.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `document_type`

integer

Whether this is a regular document or an attachment.

Choices (2):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `1` | PACER Document |
| `2` | Attachment |

### `document_number`

string

If the file is a document, the number is the document_number in RECAP docket.

Lookups: `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`

### `pacer_doc_id`

string | array of string

The ID of the document in PACER.

### `is_available`

boolean

True if the item is available in RECAP

### `sha1`

string

The ID used for a document in RECAP

### `ocr_status`

integer

The status of OCR processing on this item.

Choices (4):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `1` | OCR Complete |
| `2` | OCR Not Necessary |
| `3` | OCR Failed |
| `4` | OCR Needed |

### `is_free_on_pacer`

boolean

Is this item freely available as an opinion on PACER?
